description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with five stories, featuring a modern, minimalist facade dominated by large rectangular windows arranged in a regular grid. The exterior is primarily white, with subtle accents around the window frames and balconies, and the building includes several private balconies on the upper floors. The flat roof is partially visible and appears to have rooftop access and some outdoor spaces. The ground level includes a main entrance and a secondary door, with a small tree and landscaping elements adjacent to the building. The structure is constructed mainly from concrete and glass, with metal railings and window frames. The overall design is functional and geometric, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A five-story modern apartment building with large windows, balconies, and a white facade, featuring rooftop access and minimal landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central stairwell, and a tree near the facade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of balconies and the building's rectangular profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional balconies, a secondary entrance, and more window groupings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the window arrangement and a tree at the corner.
attribute_window_arrangement: The windows are arranged in a symmetrical, evenly spaced grid pattern across all floors, with each floor featuring multiple large rectangular windows aligned vertically and horizontally.
